title: Wheat
description: A modpack that adds a healthy amount of new content and makes the game more challenging while still retaining that same "Minecraft" feel.
body:
## Features (*as of now*)
  • Support for controller input. Some mods may add binds that you'll have to use a keyboard for.
  • Varying temperature and thirst, both of which are affected by seasons. These seasons also affect crop growth.
  • e4mc is included for easy multiplayer. Also comes with Simple Voice Chat, so you can yell at your friends.
  • Biomes o' Plenty for much prettier world generation. CTOV also makes for much nicer villages. Most Vanilla structures have been revamped, thanks to YUNG.
  • Almost completely customizable weapons, via Tetra. With all of these extra weapons, Sophisticated Backpacks has also been added.
  • You can go to space with Ad Astra.
  • Farmer's Delight and other mods that add more to it for an extra delicious playthrough.
  • The Create mod, so you can industrialize and destroy your world.
  • A more challenging early game thanks to No More Tree Punching.
  • If you want to play in third person, Shoulder Surfing Reloaded makes it much more enjoyable.
  • A balanced minimap.
  • Furniture from Supplementaries, MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod, and Macaw's Windows.
  • Sound is super scary in caves because of Sound Physics Remastered.
  • Villagers, in general, aren't nimrods anymore.
  • plus more
## About the Modpack Wheat was made for a friend and I to play a more challenging version of Minecraft with more content. It's very fun. It adds a lot to the game, but not enough to overwhelm you. The game does feel more immersive, and caves are genuinely scary to be in. The temperature and thirst are fun to deal with, and don't feel overbearing. I actually play this modpack, and really enjoy it. I hope you enjoy it too. ***Performance*** Due to a slew of performance mods like Rubidium, Modern Fix, ImmediatelyFast, and more, this modpack runs on an i3-1115G4 and 12 GB of DDR4 RAM at a stable 60 FPS. (*7 chunk render distance, 2 GB allocated, no shaders, fancy graphics*) **Credits** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/this-rocks https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows
